appDesc.merge: Drag several PDFs into order and combine them into one. Bundle assignments, gather reports, or join scans in a single pass.
appDesc.split: Break one file into several. Tap the cut points to cleanly split out just the parts you need.
appDesc.unlock: Free up a password-protected PDF. Uses a password you already know and works entirely on your device.
appDesc.extract: Pick exactly the pages you want and save them as a new PDF. Tap thumbnails to pull out a specific clause or key chapter.
appDesc.delete: Remove blank or unwanted pages. Trim the clutter before you submit for a cleaner document.
appDesc.organize: See every page at a glance, then drag to reorder, rotate, or delete. Straighten out jumbled scans and tangled page orders exactly as you see them.
appDesc.to-image: Turn PDF pages into JPG or PNG images. Perfect for pasting straight into blogs, social posts, and presentations.
appDesc.page-numbers: Add page numbers automatically along the bottom of your document. Choose the position, starting number, and format to give reports a polished look.
appDesc.image-to-pdf: Combine photos and screenshots into a single PDF. Drag in several JPG or PNG files, order them, and build a ready-to-submit document.
appDesc.svg-to-png: Turn vector SVG into crisp PNG images. Scale up for high resolution and choose a transparent or white background, ready for blogs, presentations, and design work.
appDesc.rotate: Straighten sideways scans and upside-down documents by rotating left or right 90° or 180°, all at once. Text and quality stay untouched.
appDesc.crop: Trim wide margins on every side (a little, medium, or a lot) to fit the content. Text and quality are fully preserved.
appDesc.compress: Shrink PDFs packed with scans or photos. Ideal for fitting email attachments or the size limits on upload sites.
appDesc.pdf-info: See page count, file size, dimensions, title, author, and lock status at a glance in a table. It only reads the details, so your file is never changed.
appDesc.remove-metadata: Wipe every hidden document property (title, author, creator app, and more) to erase traces of personal info. The content stays as-is.
appDesc.remove-blank: Automatically find and remove blank pages mixed into a scan, then save a new PDF. Great for clearing the empty backs of double-sided scans.
appDesc.add-margin: Add white margins around every page. Great for binding room, note-taking space, or preventing edge cut-off.
appDesc.extract-text: Pull the text out of a PDF into a .txt file to copy, search, and reuse. Scanned, photo-like PDFs have no real text and are skipped (this is not OCR).
appDesc.reverse: Flip a PDF's page order and save it as a new file. The last page becomes the first, perfect for fixing documents scanned back-to-front.
appDesc.grayscale: Turn a color PDF into black and white. Shrinks the file and suits grayscale printing. Text may become an image and no longer be selectable.
appDesc.nup: Arrange several pages onto one sheet, 2 or 4 up. Great for saving paper when printing and for making handouts.
appDesc.sign: Draw your signature, upload a stamp or signature image, or type your name, then drag it wherever you want on the preview. Because nothing is ever uploaded, signing contracts and consent forms stays completely private.
appDesc.watermark: Stamp text like 'CONFIDENTIAL' or 'COPY', or a logo image, onto every page. Place it diagonally in the center or tile it across the page, and fine-tune the angle and opacity to deter unauthorized copying.
appDesc.flatten: Lock the values in a filled-out application or contract onto the page so recipients can't change them and it looks identical everywhere. Pages aren't turned into images, so the text stays crisp.
appDesc.protect: Set an open password so only people who know it can open the PDF. You can also restrict printing and copying. It's the opposite of Unlock, and everything is encrypted right in your browser, with nothing ever uploaded.
appDesc.gif-to-png: Turn the first frame of an animated GIF into a PNG. Lossless, with transparency preserved, into a still image that opens anywhere.
appDesc.gif-to-jpg: Turn a GIF into a lightweight JPG. Animated GIFs keep just their first frame, and transparent areas become white.
appDesc.avif-to-png: Convert modern AVIF into lossless PNG that opens anywhere. Transparent backgrounds are kept intact.
appDesc.avif-to-jpg: Convert AVIF into widely compatible JPG, ready to drop straight into chats, documents, and email.
appDesc.jpg-to-png: Turn JPG photos into lossless, transparency-capable PNG. Great for places that only accept PNG, or for editing and archiving.
appDesc.png-to-jpg: Turn heavy PNGs into lightweight JPG. Transparent backgrounds are filled with white, and you can choose the quality.
appDesc.webp-to-png: Convert web-oriented WEBP into lossless PNG that opens anywhere. Transparent backgrounds are kept intact.
appDesc.webp-to-jpg: Convert WEBP into widely compatible JPG, ready to drop straight into chats, documents, and email.
appDesc.png-to-webp: Turn heavy PNGs into lightweight WEBP. It looks exactly the same, just far smaller, for a faster website.
appDesc.jpg-to-webp: Turn JPG into lighter WEBP. Same quality at a smaller size, so your web pages load faster.
appDesc.svg-to-jpg: Turn vector SVG into JPG that works everywhere. Scale up for high resolution; transparent areas become white.
appDesc.svg-to-webp: Turn vector SVG into lightweight WEBP. Choose the scale and keep transparency.

appShort.extract: Extract just the pages you want

chrome.footTagline: A free suite of PDF tools that runs right in your browser: no install, no sign-up, and your files are never uploaded to a server.
chrome.footCopyright: © 2026 Everything PDF — made in Korea, runs on your device.
chrome.dropHintSuffix: or drag & drop or paste · files are processed only in your browser
chrome.noscript: This tool requires JavaScript. Please turn on JavaScript in your browser. Your files are still never sent to a server and are processed only in your browser.
chrome.winbarSuffix: here to start working right away
chrome.relHint: All free · no install, ready to use

homeTrust.span: Open it and use it instantly

homeSteps.p: Drag your PDFs or images onto the screen, or pick them with Choose file.
Choose the options you need (order, range, quality) and hit the run button.
Save your finished file right away. Close the tab and nothing is left behind.

homeWhy.h: Your files never leave your device
homeWhy.p: Merging, converting, compressing, and every other task runs entirely on your device. Handle sensitive documents like contracts and IDs with total peace of mind.
No sign-up, no payment, and no limits on file count or size. Your results are never stamped with a watermark.
Instead of the clumsy machine translation you get from foreign tools, every step comes with clear, natural guidance so anyone can use it with ease.

homeFaq.a: Yes. Every tool is completely free, with no watermarks and no limits on file count or size.

homeFaq.q: Are my files uploaded to a server?
homeFaq.a: No. Every task runs entirely inside your web browser, and your files are never sent to any server. Close the tab and they vanish from memory.

homeFaq.q: Do I need to sign up or install anything?
homeFaq.a: Neither. Just open this page and you can start using it right away.

homeFaq.q: Can I use it on my phone?
homeFaq.a: Yes. Most tools work the same way in your phone or tablet browser.

outNameHint.en: Optional · defaults to the standard name

mergeInsertBlank.en: Insert a blank page between files

organizeHint.ko: PDF를 올리면 모든 페이지가 아래에 펼쳐집니다. 끌어서 순서를 바꾸고, ↺ ↻로 회전, ✕로 삭제하세요.
organizeHint.en: Once you add a PDF, all its pages spread out below. Drag to reorder, use ↺ ↻ to rotate, and ✕ to delete.

rotPagesHint.ko: '선택한 페이지'일 때 · 예: 1, 3, 5-7 · 썸네일을 눌러 골라도 됩니다
rotPagesHint.en: When 'Selected pages' is chosen · e.g. 1, 3, 5-7 · you can also tap thumbnails to pick

compressInfoHint.ko: 스캔본·사진 PDF에 효과가 큽니다. 글자 위주 PDF는 거의 줄지 않거나 글자가 이미지로 바뀔 수 있어요.
compressInfoHint.en: Works best on scanned or photo-heavy PDFs. Text-only PDFs barely shrink, and their text may be turned into an image.

infoHint.ko: PDF를 올리면 페이지 수·용량·크기·메타데이터·잠김 여부를 표로 보여줘요. 파일을 바꾸거나 저장하지 않습니다.
infoHint.en: Add a PDF and we'll show its page count, size, dimensions, metadata, and lock status in a table. We never change or save your file.

removeMetaHint.ko: 제목·작성자·생성 프로그램·키워드 등 숨은 문서 속성을 모두 비웁니다. 본문 내용은 그대로 유지돼요.
removeMetaHint.en: Clears every hidden document property (title, author, creator app, keywords, and more). The content itself stays untouched.

removeBlankHint.ko: 거의 흰 페이지를 자동으로 찾아 제거합니다. 아주 옅은 내용은 빈 페이지로 볼 수 있으니 결과를 확인하세요.
removeBlankHint.en: Automatically finds and removes near-blank pages. Very faint content may be treated as blank, so check the result.

extractTextHint.ko: PDF 속 글자를 .txt 파일로 뽑아요. 사진처럼 스캔된 PDF(이미지)는 글자가 없어 추출되지 않아요(OCR 아님).
extractTextHint.en: Pulls the text from your PDF into a .txt file. Scanned, image-only PDFs have no real text, so nothing is extracted (this is not OCR).

reverseHint.ko: 모든 페이지의 순서를 거꾸로 뒤집어요. 마지막 페이지가 첫 페이지가 됩니다. 본문은 그대로.
reverseHint.en: Flips the order of every page. The last page becomes the first, and the content stays the same.

grayscaleHint.ko: 컬러를 흑백으로. 각 페이지를 이미지로 다시 그리는 방식이라 글자 선택·검색은 안 될 수 있어요. 흑백 인쇄·용량 절감에 좋아요.
grayscaleHint.en: Turns color into grayscale. Each page is redrawn as an image, so text may no longer be selectable or searchable. Great for black-and-white printing and smaller files.

signHint.ko: 사인을 그리거나, 도장·사인 이미지를 올리거나, 이름을 입력해 만든 뒤 오른쪽 미리보기에 끌어다 놓으세요. 모서리를 끌면 크기가 바뀝니다.
signHint.en: Draw your signature, upload a stamp or signature image, or type your name, then drag it onto the preview on the right. Drag a corner to resize.

signUploadHint.ko: 투명 배경 PNG(도장·사인)를 권장해요. 흰 배경 이미지는 사각형으로 들어갑니다.
signUploadHint.en: A transparent PNG (stamp or signature) works best. Images with a white background will appear as a rectangle.

wmTextHint.ko: 한글 가능 · 예: 대외비, 사본 금지
wmTextHint.en: Any text works · e.g. CONFIDENTIAL, DO NOT COPY

wmImgHint.ko: 선택한 이미지: 없음 · 투명 배경 PNG(로고·도장)를 권장해요.
wmImgHint.en: Selected image: None · a transparent PNG (logo or stamp) works best.

flattenHint.ko: 채워 넣은 양식(폼)의 입력값을 페이지에 고정해, 받는 사람이 수정할 수 없고 어떤 뷰어에서나 똑같이 보이도록 만들어요. 각 페이지를 이미지로 바꾸지 않아 글자는 그대로 보존됩니다. 입력 양식이 없는 PDF는 평탄화할 대상이 없어요.
flattenHint.en: Locks the values in a filled-out form onto the page so recipients can't edit them and it looks the same in any viewer. Pages aren't turned into images, so the text stays crisp. A PDF with no form fields has nothing to flatten.

protectPwHint.ko: 이 비밀번호를 알아야 PDF를 열 수 있어요
protectPwHint.en: This password is required to open the PDF

protectRestrictHint.ko: 인쇄·복사를 끄면 열기 비밀번호와 별개의 소유자 암호로 제한이 걸립니다(뷰어에 따라 제한 적용이 다를 수 있어요).
protectRestrictHint.en: Turning off printing or copying applies restrictions through an owner password that's separate from the open password (enforcement varies by viewer).

protectCallout.ko: 비밀번호를 잊으면 되돌릴 수 없어요. 설정한 비밀번호는 이 기기 어디에도 저장되지 않으니 꼭 따로 기억해 두세요. 파일은 서버로 전송되지 않고 브라우저에서 암호화됩니다.
protectCallout.en: If you forget the password, there's no way to recover it. The password you set is never stored anywhere on this device, so be sure to note it down separately. Your file is never sent to a server; it's encrypted right in your browser.

unlockPwHint.ko: 열 때 비밀번호를 묻는 경우에만 입력
unlockPwHint.en: Only enter this if opening the PDF asks for a password

unlockRasterNote.ko: ※ 이미지로 해제하면 글자 선택·복사·편집이 안 되는 이미지 PDF로 바뀝니다. 비밀번호가 걸려 일반 해제가 안 될 때만 쓰세요.
unlockRasterNote.en: Note: Unlocking as images produces an image-only PDF whose text can't be selected, copied, or edited. Use it only when a password prevents the normal unlock.

unlockCallout.ko: 암호 크랙이 아닙니다. 본인이 아는 비밀번호, 또는 인쇄·편집 제한만 제거합니다. 모르는 비밀번호는 풀 수 없어요.
unlockCallout.en: This is not password cracking. It only removes a password you already know, or print/edit restrictions. A password you don't know can't be recovered.

extractPagesHint.en: e.g. 1, 3, 5-7 · you can also tap thumbnails to pick

deletePagesHint.en: e.g. 2, 4, 6-8 · you can also tap thumbnails to pick

pnAsciiNote.en: Note: The prefix and suffix support letters, numbers, and symbols only (no Korean characters).

pnBox.en: Add a semi-transparent background behind numbers (for readability)

about.sub: A free suite of PDF tools with no install and no sign-up. The biggest difference: your files are never uploaded to a server.
about.lead: Every task in Everything PDF runs only inside your web browser (on your own device). No file is ever sent to a server.

sections.body: Merging, splitting, converting, and every other task runs only inside your web browser (on your own device). Your PDFs are never uploaded to any server, and once a task finishes or you close the tab, they disappear from memory. Once you've loaded the page, most features even keep working with no internet connection.

sections.h: Do you collect any personal data?
sections.body: This site has no sign-up and collects or stores no personal data at all — no files, no email, nothing. Because files are never sent anywhere, uploaded documents are never kept off your device. That said, third parties such as Google may use cookies to display ads (see 'Ads & cookies' below).

sections.h: How are ads and cookies used?
sections.body: To stay free, this site displays Google AdSense ads. Third-party ad vendors, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. You can turn off personalized ads in Google Ads Settings, or opt out of third-party ad cookies altogether at aboutads.info. Regardless of ads or analytics, the PDF files you add are still never sent to a server and are processed only in your browser.
Yes. It's completely free, results carry no watermark, and there are no limits on file count or size.
Everything PDF is an open-source project that anyone can read and help improve. Feature ideas, bug reports, and contributions are all welcome. Join us in the GitHub repository.

Unlock is not a cracking tool for figuring out passwords; it only removes a password you already know, or print/edit restrictions. Please use it only on your own documents that you're authorized to modify.

privacy.sub: Everything PDF never uploads your files to a server — everything is processed in your browser. This document explains what information is handled and how.
privacy.lead: Effective date: 2026-07-08 · This policy applies to Everything PDF (https://everything-pdf.site).

sections.body: This site has no sign-up and does not collect, store, or transmit personal data such as the files you add or your email. Every PDF and image task runs only inside your browser (on your device).

sections.h: What happens to the files I add?
sections.body: Merging, splitting, converting, and every other task run only inside your web browser. Files are never sent to any server, and once a task finishes or you close the tab, they disappear from browser memory. So your document contents are never stored elsewhere or shared with a third party.

The site itself directly collects no personal data of any kind — no name, email, phone number, or file contents. We run no login and no user tracking. However, the hosting and advertising providers below may process technical information.

This site is hosted on GitHub Pages. To deliver and secure the service, the host may temporarily process standard access logs such as your IP address and browser type. Details are governed by GitHub's privacy policy.

To stay free, this site displays Google AdSense ads. Third-party ad vendors, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on your visits to this and other sites (such as the DART cookie). You can review Google's advertising technologies policy, turn off personalized ads in Google Ads Settings, or opt out of third-party ad cookies altogether at aboutads.info. Regardless of ads, the files you add are never sent to a server and are processed only in your browser.
This site may contain links to external sites such as GitHub. This policy does not cover how those sites handle your data, so please review each site's own policy.
This site is not directed at children under 14, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
This policy may be revised as laws or the service change. When it is, we'll post the updated version here along with a new effective date.
For questions about how your data is handled, please reach us through the contact page.

contact.sub: Feature ideas, bug reports, and partnership or advertising inquiries are all welcome. Reach us through the channels below.
contact.lead: Your feedback genuinely helps us improve the service. We'll review it and get back to you.

sections.body: For general questions, partnerships, or advertising, email us at board@innohi.ai.kr.
Everything PDF is open source. The fastest way to get a bug or improvement acted on is to file a GitHub issue.
Want to read the code and help improve it? You can join in by forking the GitHub repository and opening a pull request.
